name: NL compiler — compile English macro via /api/skill/compile-natural
description: Verifies the NL compiler returns a valid steps array for a simple English instruction. Requires a real GitHub Models token (via csimple-addon settings or CLOUD_RELAY token) and network access, so it is gated behind EVAL_ALLOW_LLM=1 and skipped by default in CI/local `npm run eval` runs.

body.description: open notepad and type hello world
